title: Journey to Smart Transformation
authors: Furkan Bacak, Ceyhan Sarı, İzel Çelikkaya
description: As part of the 77 studies under the theme "Journey to Smart Transformation", our study titled "Smart Cities and Spatial Informatics" (Akıllı Kentler ve Mekânsal Bilişim), which we prepared with my colleagues, has been included in the publication.

title: YÖNAR/MU'2021 Proceedings Abstracts Book (Page 109)
authors: Furkan Bacak, Ceyhan Sarı, İzel Çelikkaya
description: Includes a summary of our paper titled 'Smart Cities and Spatial Informatics' (Akıllı Kentler ve Mekânsal Bilişim), which was prepared in collaboration with our colleagues for the Management Research/Engineering Applications 2021 (YÖNAR/MU'2021) Symposium.
